headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Extra Space Storage, Raises Price Target to $156
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $145 to $156.

headline: Overcharged for Storage? U-Haul 1-Year Price Lock Delivers Certainty
summary: PHOENIX, March 02, 2026--U-Haul® announced today it is changing the self-storage industry with a 1-Year Price Lock Guarantee.

raw.headline: Overcharged for Storage? U-Haul 1-Year Price Lock Delivers Certainty
